projects.title: FlappyMC Pygame
projects.bodyText:
- **Authors:** Edwin Deras Jr.
- **Description:** A simple Flappy Bird clone made with Pygame in Python using Minecraft Assets

projects.title: SEC-INFRA-01: Security Infrastructure (NIST Alignment Profile)
projects.bodyText:
- **Authors:** Edwin Deras Jr. & Marwin Deras
- **Project Focus:** Implementing a security infrastructure aligned with the NIST CSF framework.
- **Key Partner:** Eagle Eye Security (Dummy)
- **Baseline Framework:** NIST SP 800-30 Auditing.

projects.title: SEC-BCP-01: Business Continuity (NIST Alignment Profile)
projects.bodyText:
- **Authors:** Edwin Deras Jr. & Marwin Deras
- **Project Focus:** Implementing a business continuity plan aligned with the NIST CSF framework.
- **Key Partner:** Eagle Eye Security (Dummy)
- **Baseline Framework:** NIST SP 800-30 Auditing.
